subcodes.first_line: This is a Book We have sent down in truth, that those who have believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, might rejoice therein. Blessed is he who holdeth fast unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لیفرح به الذین آمنوا بالله رب العالمین طوبی لمن تمسک
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
